name: Cupid Limited
summary: Cupid Limited designs, manufactures, markets, and supplies male and female condoms in India and internationally. The company also offers water based lubricant jellies; hand sanitizers; and hair removal creams. In addition, it provides contract manufacturing services. The company was formerly known as Cupid Condom Limited and changed its name to Cupid Limited in January 2006. Cupid Limited was founded in 1993 and is based in Nashik, India.
